# Michael - Data Scientist and Creator of autonomous cognitive systems

> Constructing infrastructure for entropy defense and preservation of ontological independence.

## About
Michael is a Data Scientist and creator of autonomous cognitive systems. This portfolio site outlines his philosophy, architecture ("Exocortex"), and fundamental axioms.

## Sections
- [Hero Section](#hero): Introduction and high-level overview.
- [Exocortex](#exocortex): Infrastructure of Sovereignty, a local autonomous intelligence architecture.
- [Axioms](#axioms): Fundamental Architecture broken down into Being (Module A) and Doing (Module B).
